/usr/bin/ar qc libsail_runtime.a CMakeFiles/sail_runtime.dir/home/vogtb/.opam/5.1.1/share/sail/lib/elf.c.o CMakeFiles/sail_runtime.dir/home/vogtb/.opam/5.1.1/share/sail/lib/rts.c.o CMakeFiles/sail_runtime.dir/home/vogtb/.opam/5.1.1/share/sail/lib/sail.c.o CMakeFiles/sail_runtime.dir/home/vogtb/.opam/5.1.1/share/sail/lib/sail_failure.c.o CMakeFiles/sail_runtime.dir/home/vogtb/.opam/5.1.1/share/sail/lib/cJSON.c.o CMakeFiles/sail_runtime.dir/home/vogtb/.opam/5.1.1/share/sail/lib/sail_config.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libsail_runtime.a
